lyrics_lrc:
[00:00.92]Sea Star power! Watch me go!
[00:04.54]Sea Star power! Top to toe!
[00:08.20]Five-point arms and a heart so big,
[00:11.80]Sea Star power — that's our jig!
[00:15.46]Sea Star power! Watch me go!
[00:19.10]Sea Star power! Top to toe!
[00:23.90]S-E-A — S-T-A-R!
[00:26.36]Sea Star power, here we are!
[00:28.86]Sea Star power! Yeah yeah yeah!
[00:30.08]Sea Star power! Stingray Cay!
